title: File system scanner
description: Scanner MUST recursively traverse project directories and identify source files for annotation extraction.

title: Annotation parser
description: Parser MUST extract @req annotations from source files and map them to requirement IDs.

title: Orphan detection
description: Scanner MUST detect annotations referencing non-existent requirement IDs and flag them as orphans.

title: Requirements REST endpoint
description: API MUST expose GET /requirements returning a filtered, sorted list of requirements.

title: Stats aggregation endpoint
description: API MUST expose GET /stats returning requirement, annotation, and task statistics with coverage percentage.

title: Scan trigger endpoint
description: API MUST expose POST /scan to trigger a re-scan and GET /scan to poll scan status.

title: Response time SLA
description: All API endpoints MUST respond within 500ms for projects with up to 1000 requirements.

title: Input validation
description: API MUST validate and sanitize all query parameters. Invalid values MUST return 400 with a typed error.
